info.name: Twilio Messaging API
info.description:
Send and receive SMS and MMS messages globally using Twilio's Messaging API. Supports programmable messaging, messaging services, alphanumeric sender IDs, A2P 10DLC registration, toll-free verification, and link shortening.

Contact Support:
 Name: Twilio Support
 Email: support@twilio.com

query.description: Number of records to return per page (max 1000)

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Twilio account

request.description: Retrieve a list of messages associated with your account. The list includes paging information and is sorted by DateSent descending.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Recipient phone number in E.164 format
Twilio phone number, short code, or alphanumeric sender ID
The text content of the message (max 1600 characters)
SID of the messaging service to use
URLs of media to include in MMS messages (max 10)
URLs of media to include in MMS messages (max 10)
URL for status callback notifications
Maximum price in USD to pay for the message
Validity period in seconds (max 14400)
Time to send a scheduled message (requires messaging service)
Schedule type for scheduled messages
SID of a content template to use
JSON string of variables for content templates

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Twilio account

request.description: Send an SMS or MMS message. Specify the recipient, sender, and body or media URL. Messages can be sent from a Twilio phone number, short code, alphanumeric sender ID, or messaging service.

response.name: Message created and queued for delivery
